goal: Add governed chat-derived long-term memory, reflection jobs and secret handles to the existing memory service.
global_constraints: Do not bypass Django policies or declared AI tools.
Do not write secret values to prompts, tool traces, memory chunks, safe corpus, indexes, ChatMessage metadata, AgentActionLog payloads or ordinary logs.
Use atomic file writes for runtime memory files.
Keep source chat history separate from curated long-term memory.
Keep organization candidate publication human-reviewed unless actor has explicit organization write permission.
